name: Apple-Walnut Salad with Watercress
recipeIngredient: 1/2 tsp Salt OR 1 t Soy sauce
1 large Watercress bunch, tough stems removed
1 Apple, Red Delicious, cored and shredded
1 Apple, Golden Delicious, cored and shredded
recipeInstructions:
1. In a small bowl, combine all dressing ingredients. Mix well.
2. Arrange watercress around the outside edge of a large platter.
3. Scatter carrot next to the watercress.
4. In a small bowl, toss shredded apples with lemon juice.
5. Spoon apples into the center of the platter.
6. Scatter nuts on top of the apples.
7. Pour dressing over the salad and serve immediately. Serves 4.
